question: What is the country of the player with the highest earnings among players that have more than 2 win counts?
sql: SELECT Country FROM player WHERE Wins_count > 2 ORDER BY Earnings DESC LIMIT 1;

back_translation.intent: 查找获胜次数超过2次的玩家的国家，并按收入降序排列，取最高收入的那个

semantic.reason: 语义完全一致。原始问题要求在获胜次数>2的玩家中找到最高收入者并返回其国家，SQL描述通过过滤(Wins_count > 2)、按收入降序排序(order_by: Earnings DESC)并限制返回1条记录(limit: 1)实现了相同逻辑，目标列(Country)和表(player)也完全匹配。
